name: Quick and Easy Microwave White Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6.5 oz Can of chopped or minced clams with liquid
2 tsp Garlic powder or granulated garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwave-safe casserole dish, place the cream cheese and microwave on high for 1 minute to melt.
2. Open the can of clams and pour their liquid into the melted cream cheese. Stir until combined.
3. Add lemon pepper, garlic powder, dried parsley flakes, and grated Parmesan cheese. Mix well.
4. Return the mixture to the microwave and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until heated through. Adjust seasonings as desired, adding more herbs if preferred.
5. Serve over cooked pasta.
